feedback.text: Dear eu, i am from the Netherlands, i would like to suggest that it is not fair that whenn you pay for digital games that the maker of the game, can pull the plug on what you bought, and no longer you will be able you enjoy what you bought, i all other area's when you buy something you get to enjoy it, as it it yours, in video games, not only the whole game can be taken from you, but also thing that you bought inside the game, some game have a whole digital gambling area going on, and while that is already destructive enough, your not even sure if you get to keep what you get anyway. because they can kill, / cancel the game at anytime. there must be a way that games can be preserved for the buyer in some sort of form. like the stop skilling games initiative, / European Citizens' Initiative is trying to explain. through here, or through there, or both. help people to have change to keep there games in a playable format, and stop getting ripped of by the conglomerates thank you
